text.title: CI Evaluation Gate Config Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules with rationale + source for ci-eval-gate-config. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: CI MUST run against a corpus pinned by SHA; the corpus file itself MUST be version-controlled.

rationale.source: ML-evals best practice (Karpathy + Anthropic eval docs)

rule.rationale: ML-evals best practice (Karpathy + Anthropic eval docs) — drifting fixtures destroy signal.

rule.statement: Each metric MUST have a numeric threshold + tolerance window; metrics without thresholds are reported but not gated.
rule.rationale: Without thresholds the eval is observability, not a gate; explicit thresholds force decision.

rule.statement: Gate MUST block only on regression from baseline (delta beyond tolerance), not on absolute score; absolute floors are a separate config.
rule.rationale: Anthropic eval guidance — strict absolute thresholds block legitimate work; regression gating + periodic absolute audit balances signal and friction.

rule.statement: Baseline scores MUST be pinned per branch (main = last green commit); feature branches inherit main's baseline.
rule.rationale: Without per-branch pinning, two PRs merge-racing both see green and both regress.

rule.statement: Safety-class metrics (toxicity, PII leak, refusal-required-but-not-refused) MUST have a hard absolute floor — never gated only by regression delta.
rule.rationale: OWASP LLM Top 10 (LLM02 insecure output) — safety regressions must fail even within tolerance.

rule.statement: Cost-per-fixture and p95 latency MUST be tracked and gated with their own thresholds; quality without cost/latency gate is incomplete.
rule.rationale: FinOps + product reality — a 30% quality win at 5x cost is rarely shippable.

rule.statement: Every eval run MUST publish a JSON artifact + Markdown summary to the PR; results are not console-only.
rule.rationale: Without artifact, PR reviewers cannot inspect the eval; gate becomes a black box.

rule.statement: If feature has no measurable quality or no fixture corpus, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Eval gate cannot be installed without a corpus.
